stories.title: TSMC’s Local Investors Narrow Valuation Gap With Wall Street
stories.summary: Local investors are driving the premium on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s US-listed shares to a two-year low as they pile into the chipmaker’s stock in Taipei on bets the AI boom has further to run.

stories.title: US, Iran Trade Drafts of Deal
stories.summary: The US and Iran traded messages over the weekend seeking changes to a draft agreement that would extend a ceasefire and open the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Wendy Benjaminson has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Hong Kong must embrace ‘bipolar’ role to thrive in ‘Stage 3.0’: ex-HKEX boss Charles Li
stories.summary: Charles Li Xiaojia, the longest-serving CEO of Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing (HKEX), defined a decade of city finance by bridging the gap between Chinese and global capital. From his early days as an offshore oil worker in northeastern China to serving as chairman of JPMorgan Chase’s China division, Li’s career has resembled China’s own economic opening. stories.title: US, Iran Trade Deal Drafts as Israel Expands Lebanon Assault
stories.summary: The US and Iran traded messages over the weekend seeking changes to a draft agreement that would extend a ceasefire and open the Strait of Hormuz, but it was unclear whether the sides were making much progress.

stories.title: India Rate Risks, Fiscal Worries Add to Pressure on Bond Yields
stories.summary: The recent surge in Indian bond yields may extend as investors weigh prospects of interest-rate hikes, while concerns grow over the government’s fiscal position.

stories.summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said the US central bank would lose the credibility that’s required to support a strong and stable economy if any president were free to dismiss Fed officials over policy disagreements.

stories.summary: Dell Technologies Inc. introduced a redesigned XPS 13 laptop, positioning the device as a direct answer to Apple Inc.’s popular MacBook Neo, which stunned the budget PC market upon its debut in March with its features and price.

stories.summary: Asian stocks climbed to a record as investors doubled down on the artificial intelligence trade that’s powered global equities to all-time highs. Oil climbed as a US-Iran ceasefire deal remained elusive.

stories.title: Ukraine’s Drone Warfare Redefines Battlefield Dynamics

stories.title: The Aluminum Shock Hitting the Global Economy
stories.summary: The global aluminum market is being squeezed by two powerful forces at once: conflict in the Middle East and rising US tariffs. stories.title: Key Takeaways From the Shangri-La Dialogue Forum
stories.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth praised defense allies in Asia and hailed newly stable ties with China at an Asia security forum in Singapore. Key US allies in the region also spoke about the security impact of geopolitical tensions both in Asia-Pacific and the Middle East. Bloomberg's China Correspondent Minmin Low breaks down the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)
